title: Robin Vanishes into Water Seven
description: Robin’s secret movements and the World Government’s presence begin to pull Water Seven away from a simple ship-repair story.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part follows Luffy, Franky, Nico Robin, Nami, Paulie. Robin’s secret movements and the World Government’s presence begin to pull Water Seven away from a simple ship-repair story.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Yeah, yeah!!! This town's gonna sink

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We gotta get to a higher place!!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Yeah, yeah!!! We gotta take refuge!!!

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Don't let the Assassins get away ****!!!

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Don't play dumb with us, you assassin!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Water seven also becomes your enemy!!!

summary: Robin’s secret movements and the World Government’s presence begin to pull Water Seven away from a simple ship-repair story.
